title: ononis cephalotes var. montana
intro: Ononis cephalotes var. montana, also known as Mountain Restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its pinkish-purple flowers and hairy stems. The medicinal properties of Mountain Restharrow lie in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent qualities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Mountain Restharrow can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote natural healing processes.
